---
title: "Chapter6"
output: html_document
date: "2026-02-10"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

source files 
```{r}
source('Brownian_motion.R',keep.source = TRUE) # functions for Brownian motion simulations
source('EM.R',keep.source = TRUE) # functions for EM-simulation
source('plots.R',keep.source = TRUE) # functions for plotting
library(Rcpp)
sourceCpp("fitzhugh_rcpp.cpp") # functions for Strang splitting and likelihood 
```

Configurations for FitzHugh-Nagumo simulation
```{r}
# Step configuration for EM simulation
N <- 300000
h <- 0.0001
T <- N*h
times <- seq(0,N*h,length.out=N+1)

# Configuration for sub-sampled paths
sub_h <- 0.18
ratio <- sub_h / h
sub_times <- seq(0,N*h,length.out=N/ratio+1)
idx <- seq(1,N+1,by=ratio)

# drift 
F <- function(x,theta = c(0.05,0.5,1.5,1.4)){
  # parameters
  eps <- theta[1]; alpha <- theta[2]; gamma <- theta[3]; beta <- theta[4]
  # variables
  X <- x[1]; Y <- x[2]
  c(
    (X-X^3-Y+alpha)/eps,
    gamma*X-Y+beta
  )
}

# additive noise
G <- function(x, Sigma = c(0.3,0.5)) Sigma
```


1000 FitzHugh-nagumo trajectories are stored in 'fitzhugh_paths.csv' to save computer time. Change sim_new_paths to TRUE to simulate new paths. 
```{r}
sim_new_paths <- FALSE

if (sim_new_paths){
  full_paths <- EM_sim_fast(F,G,x0=c(0,0),times,n_paths=15,progress=TRUE)
  paths <- lapply(full_paths, function(path) path[idx,])
  
  #write.csv(bind_rows(sub_paths, .id = "path_id"), "fitzhugh_paths.csv", row.names = FALSE)
}else{
  paths_df <- read.csv("fitzhugh_paths.csv")
  paths <- paths_df %>%
    split(.$path) %>%
    lapply(select, -path)
}


```


Plots for Figure 1
```{r fig.height=8, fig.width=16}
example_path <- EM_sim_fast(F,G,x0=c(0,0),times,n_paths=1,progress=FALSE)

# Plot one path
plot_2d_curve(paths[[1]])

# Plot phase portrait of FHN drift
plot_FHN_phase_portrait(par=c(0.05,0.5,1.5,1.4))
```

Cloud plots
```{r fig.height=8, fig.width=16}
# initial points
x1 <- c(0.5, 1)
x2 <- c(1,0)
x3 <- c(-1.25,1.2)
x4 <- c(-0.65,0.15)
x0_vals <- rbind(x1, x2, x3, x4)

par <- c(0.1, 0.5, 1.5, 1.4, 0.3, 0.5)

# time setup
N <- 600
h <- 0.0001
strang_h <- N * h
times <- seq(0, N * h, length.out = N + 1)


# EM paths 
EM_step1 <- EM_step(F, G, x1, times, progress = FALSE)
EM_step2 <- EM_step(F, G, x2, times, progress = FALSE)
EM_step3 <- EM_step(F, G, x3, times, progress = FALSE)
EM_step4 <- EM_step(F, G, x4, times, progress = FALSE)

EM_steps <- as.data.frame(rbind(EM_step1, EM_step2, EM_step3, EM_step4))

if (!all(c("x","y") %in% names(EM_steps))) {
  names(EM_steps)[1:2] <- c("x", "y")
}




df_steps_b1 <- one_step_pred_rcpp(x0= x0_vals,h= strang_h,par= par,n= 1000,method = "fix",order  = "fmuf")
df_steps_b2 <- one_step_pred_rcpp(x0= x0_vals,h= strang_h,par= par,n= 1000,method = "custom", order  = "fmuf",center = c(-1,0.5))
df_steps_b3 <- one_step_pred_rcpp(x0= x0_vals,h= strang_h,par= par,n= 1000,method = "custom", order  = "fmuf",center = c(0,0.5))
df_steps_b4 <- one_step_pred_rcpp(x0= x0_vals,h= strang_h,par= par,n= 1000,method = "custom", order  = "fmuf",center = c(1,0.5))

plot_multiple_steps(
  df_path = example_path,
  EM_steps = EM_steps,
  df_steps_list = list(df_steps_b1,df_steps_b2,df_steps_b3,df_steps_b4),
  b_list = list(fixed_point_rcpp(par = par),c(-1,0.5),c(0,0.5),c(1,0.5)), # red circle overlays
  titles = c("Fixed point","(b1,b2)=(-1,0.5)","(b1,b2)=(0,0.5)","(b1,b2)=(1,0.5"),
  ncol = 2,
  xlim = c(-1.5,1.4), ylim = c(-0.4,1.6),
  legend_pos = "bottom"
)
```

```{r fig.height=8, fig.width=16}
df_steps_b5 <- one_step_pred_rcpp(x0= x0_vals,h= strang_h,par= par,n= 1000,method = "piecewise",order  = "fmuf")


plot_multiple_steps(
  df_path = example_path,
  EM_steps = EM_steps,
  df_steps_list = list(df_steps_b5),
  b_list = list(list(c(-1,0,1),c(0.5,0.5,0.5))),
  titles = c("Piecewise linearization"),
  ncol = 2,
  xlim = c(-1.5,1.4), ylim = c(-0.4,1.6),
  legend_pos = "bottom"
)
```


Parameter estimation for 1000 FitzHugh-Nagumo reptitions 
```{r fig.height=8, fig.width=16}
# Corrected splitting methods
splitting_methods <- c("fix","test2")

# Starting values for optimization
# Method names, true parameters and parameter labels (for overlay in plots)
splitting_labels <- c("fix","Newton step")

true_params <- c(0.1, 0.5, 1.5, 1.4, 0.3, 0.5)
param_labels <- c("epsilon","alpha","gamma","beta","sigma[1]","sigma[2]")

fit_for_center <- function(method_name, show_progress = FALSE) {
  n_paths <- length(paths)     
  preds <- vector("list", n_paths)

  for (i in seq_along(paths)) {
    if (show_progress) message("  fitting path ", i, " / ", n_paths)
    this_path <- paths[[i]]  

    # minimize negative log-likelihood
    obj <- function(par, path, times, method_name) {
      theta_drift     <- par[1:4]
      theta_diffusion <- par[5:6]

      # Return big penalty if invalid
      if (par[4] < 0.001 || par[5] < 0.001) return(1e20)
      if (par[1] > 1 || par[1] < 1e-6) return(1e20)
      
      # Call Rcpp likelihood function from fitzhugh_rcpp.cpp
      ll <- tryCatch(
        log_lik_path_rcpp(as.matrix(path), times, theta_drift, theta_diffusion,
                          method = method_name),
        error = function(e) NA_real_
      )
      
      if (!is.numeric(ll) || !is.finite(ll)) return(1e20)
      return(ll)
    }
    rand <- c(runif(1,-0.1,0.1),runif(1,-0.1,0.1),runif(1,-0.1,0.1),runif(1,-0.1,0.1),runif(1,-0.1,0.1),runif(1,-0.1,0.1))
    start_param <- true_params + rand

    # Run optimization
    fit <- optim(par    = start_param,
                 fn     = obj,
                 path   = this_path,
                 times  = sub_times, 
                 method_name = method_name,
                 method = "Nelder-Mead",
                 control = list(maxit = 5000, trace = 0))

    preds[[i]] <- fit$par
  }

  # Combine results into a data frame
  preds_mat <- do.call(rbind, preds)
  colnames(preds_mat) <- param_labels
  out_df <- as.data.frame(preds_mat)
  return(out_df)
}
# Loop through different splitting methods
all_results_list <- vector("list", length(splitting_methods))
for (i in seq_along(splitting_methods)) {
  name <- splitting_labels[i]     
  meth <- splitting_methods[i]     
  message("Running fits for method: ", name)

  res_df <- fit_for_center(method_name = meth, show_progress = TRUE)
  res_df <- res_df %>%
    mutate(run = seq_len(nrow(res_df)),
           center = name)

  all_results_list[[i]] <- res_df
}


```
```{r fig.height=8, fig.width=16}
# Format for plotting
all_results <- bind_rows(all_results_list)
est_df <- all_results %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(param_labels),
               names_to = "param",
               values_to = "estimate") %>%
  mutate(param = factor(param, levels = param_labels),
         center = factor(center, levels = splitting_labels))

# Plot estimates 
plot_estimates(est_df, true_params, param_labels,
               subtitle = "1000 Monte Carlo repetitions")
```


```{r fig.height=6, fig.width=8}
# initial values (black dots)
x_mat <- rbind(
  c(-1.2, 1.2),
  c(-0.5,-0.1),
  c(1,0.1),
  c(0.5,1)
)

x_mat <- rbind(
  # c(-1.3,1.397), # slow
  # c(-1.2,1.028),
  # c(-1.1,0.731),
  # c(-1,0.5),
  # c(-0.9,0.329),
  # c(-0.8,0.212),
  c(-1.5,1.397), # slow
  c(-1.4,1.028),
  c(-1.3,0.731),
  c(-1.2,0.5),
  c(-1.1,0.329),
  c(-1,0.212),
  c(-1.1,1.397), # slow
  c(-1,1.028),
  c(-0.9,0.731),
  c(-0.8,0.5),
  c(-0.7,0.329),
  c(-0.6,0.212),
  # c(1.2,-0.028),
  # c(1.1,0.269),
  # c(1,0.5),
  # c(0.9,0.671),
  # c(0.8,0.788),
  c(1.4,-0.028),
  c(1.3,0.269),
  c(1.2,0.5),
  c(1.1,0.671),
  c(1,0.788),
  c(1,-0.028),
  c(0.9,0.269),
  c(0.8,0.5),
  c(0.7,0.671),
  c(0.6,0.788),
  c(-0.5,0), # fast
  c(0,0),
  c(0.5,0),
  c(1,0),
  c(-0.5,0.2), # fast
  c(0,0.2),
  c(0.5,0.2),
  c(1,0.2),
  c(-0.5,-0.2), # fast
  c(0,-0.2),
  c(0.5,-0.2),
  c(1,-0.2),
  c(0.5,1),
  c(0,1),
  c(-0.5,1),
  c(-1,1),
  c(0.5,1.2),
  c(0,1.2),
  c(-0.5,1.2),
  c(-1,1.2),
  c(0.5,0.8),
  c(0,0.8),
  c(-0.5,0.8),
  c(-1,0.8)
)


# b-grid 
b1_seq <- seq(-1.3, 1.6, length.out = 85)
b2_seq <- seq(-0.65, 2.05, length.out = 71)
b_grid <- expand.grid(b1 = b1_seq, b2 = b2_seq)


# model parameters
step_size <- 0.07
par <- c(0.05, 0.5, 1.5, 1.4, 0.3, 0.5)

# function to copmute prediction error for a single b in single initial value
strang_pred_error <- function(x, b, strang_h, par, EM_steps) {
  # Ensure proper types
  x_mat <- matrix(as.numeric(x), nrow = 1)  
  b_vec <- as.numeric(b)

  # Call one step predictions from rcpp
  strang_df <- one_step_pred_rcpp(
    x_mat,
    strang_h,
    par,
    n = 1000,
    method = 'test',
    order = "fmuf",
    center = b_vec
  )
  strang_steps <- as.matrix(strang_df[, c("x", "y"), drop = FALSE])
  EM_steps <- as.matrix(EM_steps)

  # error between means
  err_vec <- colMeans(EM_steps) - colMeans(strang_steps)
  sqrt(sum(err_vec^2))
}


# Loop over initial points and b-grid 
process_b_grid <- function(x_values, b_grid,strang_h, par, paths, k = 1500,xlim = c(-1.4, 1.4), ylim = c(-0.6, 2.2),save=TRUE){
  xmat <- as.matrix(x_values)
  ngr <- nrow(xmat)
  out <- vector("list", ngr)
  for (i in seq_len(ngr)) {

    x <- as.numeric(xmat[i, ])
    times <- seq(0, strang_h, length.out = strang_h / 0.0001 + 1)

    F <- function(x){
      # parameters
      eps <- par[1]; alpha <- par[2]; gamma <- par[3]; beta <- par[4]
      # variables
      X <- x[1]; Y <- x[2]
      c(
        (X-X^3-Y+alpha)/eps,
        gamma*X-Y+beta
      )
    }
    G <- function(x) c(par[5],par[6])
    # Run EM step to generate "true" trajectory
    EM_steps <- EM_step_fast(F, G, matrix(x, nrow = 1), times)

    # Compute errors for every b in the grid
    errors <- apply(b_grid, 1, function(b) {
      strang_pred_error(x, b, strang_h, par, EM_steps)
    })

    b_df <- as.data.frame(b_grid)
    b_df$error <- errors
    
    p <- plot_top_k_b_choices(paths, x, b_df, par, strang_h,k = k, xlim = xlim, ylim = ylim)
    
    if (save){
      dir.create("best_FHN_splittings-TEST3", showWarnings = FALSE)  
      png_file  <- file.path("best_FHN_splittings-TEST3", sprintf("%s_topk.png", i))
      ggsave(filename = png_file, plot = p, width = 8, height = 6)
    }
    
    print(p)
    
  }
}

process_b_grid(
  x_mat,
  b_grid,
  step_size,
  par,
  example_path,
  save=TRUE
)

```

```{r fig.height=6, fig.width=8}

x_mat <- rbind(
  # c(-1.3,1.397), # slow
  # c(-1.2,1.028),
  # c(-1.1,0.731),
  # c(-1,0.5),
  # c(-0.9,0.329),
  # c(-0.8,0.212),
  c(-1.5,1.397), # slow
  c(-1.4,1.028),
  c(-1.3,0.731),
  c(-1.2,0.5),
  c(-1.1,0.329),
  c(-1,0.212),
  c(-1.1,1.397), # slow
  c(-1,1.028),
  c(-0.9,0.731),
  c(-0.8,0.5),
  c(-0.7,0.329),
  c(-0.6,0.212),
  # c(1.2,-0.028),
  # c(1.1,0.269),
  # c(1,0.5),
  # c(0.9,0.671),
  # c(0.8,0.788),
  c(1.4,-0.028),
  c(1.3,0.269),
  c(1.2,0.5),
  c(1.1,0.671),
  c(1,0.788),
  c(1,-0.028),
  c(0.9,0.269),
  c(0.8,0.5),
  c(0.7,0.671),
  c(0.6,0.788),
  c(-0.5,0), # fast
  c(0,0),
  c(0.5,0),
  c(1,0),
  c(-0.5,0.2), # fast
  c(0,0.2),
  c(0.5,0.2),
  c(1,0.2),
  c(-0.5,-0.2), # fast
  c(0,-0.2),
  c(0.5,-0.2),
  c(1,-0.2),
  c(0.5,1),
  c(0,1),
  c(-0.5,1),
  c(-1,1),
  c(0.5,1.2),
  c(0,1.2),
  c(-0.5,1.2),
  c(-1,1.2),
  c(0.5,0.8),
  c(0,0.8),
  c(-0.5,0.8),
  c(-1,0.8)
)

b_mat <- rbind(
  # c(-1/sqrt(3),-2/(3*sqrt(3))+0.5),
  # c(1/sqrt(3),2/(3*sqrt(3))+0.5),
  c(1,0.5),
  c(-1,0.5)
)

# model parameters
step_size <- 0.07
par <- c(0.05, 0.5, 1.5, 1.4, 0.3, 0.5)

# function to copmute prediction error for a single b in single initial value
pred_error <- function(x, b, strang_h, par) {
  
  x_mat <- matrix(as.numeric(x), nrow = 1)
  b_vec <- as.numeric(b)

  strang_df <- one_step_pred_rcpp(
    x_mat,
    strang_h,
    par,
    n = 1000,
    method = 'test',
    order = "fmuf",
    center = b_vec
  )
  

  
  strang_steps <- as.matrix(strang_df[, c("x", "y"), drop = FALSE])

  times <- seq(0, strang_h, length.out = strang_h / 0.0001 + 1)
  EM_steps <- EM_step_fast(F, G, matrix(x, nrow = 1), times)
  

  
  # error between means
  err_vec <- colMeans(EM_steps) - colMeans(strang_steps)
  sqrt(sum(err_vec^2))
}

process_grid <- function(x_df, b_mat, strang_h, par, paths, k = 1500,
                         xlim = c(-1.4, 1.4), ylim = c(-0.6, 2.2), save = TRUE) {
  
  ngr <- nrow(b_mat)
  
  for (i in seq_len(ngr)) {
    b <- as.numeric(b_mat[i, ])
    
    # Compute errors for every initial point
    errors <- apply(as.matrix(x_df), 1, function(x) {
      pred_error(x, b, strang_h, par)
    })
    
    x_df$error <- errors
    
    p <- plot_top_k_x_choices(paths, x_df, b, par, strang_h, k = k,
                              xlim = xlim, ylim = ylim)
    
    if (save) {
      dir.create("trust_regions", showWarnings = FALSE)
      png_file <- file.path("trust_regions", sprintf("%s.png", i))
      ggsave(filename = png_file, plot = p, width = 8, height = 6)
    }
    
    print(p)
  }
}

process_grid(
  as.data.frame(x_mat),
  b_mat,
  step_size,
  par,
  example_path,
  save=TRUE
)

```


```{r}
library(ggplot2)

# --------------------------------------------------
# Sample a cloud of x's around a center b
# --------------------------------------------------
sample_x_cloud <- function(center, n = 300, sd = c(0.15, 0.15),
                           xlim = c(-1.4, 1.4), ylim = c(-0.6, 2.2),
                           max_tries = 20) {
  center <- as.numeric(center)
  stopifnot(length(center) == 2)

  out <- matrix(NA_real_, nrow = n, ncol = 2)
  filled <- 0
  tries <- 0

  while (filled < n && tries < max_tries) {
    m <- n - filled
    cand <- cbind(
      rnorm(m, mean = center[1], sd = sd[1]),
      rnorm(m, mean = center[2], sd = sd[2])
    )

    keep <- cand[, 1] >= xlim[1] & cand[, 1] <= xlim[2] &
            cand[, 2] >= ylim[1] & cand[, 2] <= ylim[2]

    if (any(keep)) {
      kk <- sum(keep)
      out[(filled + 1):(filled + kk), ] <- cand[keep, , drop = FALSE]
      filled <- filled + kk
    }
    tries <- tries + 1
  }

  out <- out[complete.cases(out), , drop = FALSE]
  colnames(out) <- c("x", "y")
  as.data.frame(out)
}

# --------------------------------------------------
# Prediction error for one x, one b
# --------------------------------------------------
pred_error <- function(x, b, strang_h, par) {
  x_mat <- matrix(as.numeric(x), nrow = 1)
  b_vec <- as.numeric(b)

  strang_df <- one_step_pred_rcpp(
    x_mat,
    strang_h,
    par,
    n = 1000,
    method = "test",
    order = "fmuf",
    center = b_vec
  )

  strang_steps <- as.matrix(strang_df[, c("x", "y"), drop = FALSE])

  times <- seq(0, strang_h, length.out = round(strang_h / 0.0001) + 1)
  EM_steps <- EM_step_fast(F, G, matrix(x, nrow = 1), times)

  err_vec <- colMeans(EM_steps) - colMeans(strang_steps)
  sqrt(sum(err_vec^2))
}

# --------------------------------------------------
# Plot with interpolation from cloud
# --------------------------------------------------
plot_top_k_x_choices <- function(paths, x_results, b, par, h, k = 5,
                                 xlim = c(-2, 2), ylim = c(-0.2, 2.1),
                                 interp_n = 120) {
  ensure_xy <- function(df) {
    df <- as.data.frame(df)
    if (all(c("x", "y") %in% names(df))) return(df)
    if (all(c("X1", "X2") %in% names(df))) {
      names(df)[names(df) == "X1"] <- "x"
      names(df)[names(df) == "X2"] <- "y"
      return(df)
    }
    names(df)[1:2] <- c("x", "y")
    df
  }

  x_results <- as.data.frame(x_results)
  x_results <- x_results[complete.cases(x_results[, c("x", "y", "error")]), ]

  b_df <- data.frame(x = b[1], y = b[2], which = "Linearization point")

  xs <- seq(xlim[1], xlim[2], length.out = 400)
  df_xnull <- data.frame(x = xs, y = xs - xs^3 + par[2])
  df_ynull <- data.frame(x = xs, y = par[3] * xs + par[4])

  # Interpolate the scattered error cloud onto a grid
  interp_df <- NULL
  if (nrow(x_results) >= 4) {
    interp_df <- try({
      akima::interp(
        x = x_results$x,
        y = x_results$y,
        z = x_results$error,
        xo = seq(xlim[1], xlim[2], length.out = interp_n),
        yo = seq(ylim[1], ylim[2], length.out = interp_n),
        linear = TRUE,
        extrap = FALSE
      )
    }, silent = TRUE)
  }

  top_k <- x_results[order(x_results$error), , drop = FALSE]
  top_k <- head(top_k, k)

  p <- ggplot()

  if (!inherits(interp_df, "try-error") && !is.null(interp_df)) {
    grid_df <- expand.grid(x = interp_df$x, y = interp_df$y)
    grid_df$error <- as.vector(interp_df$z)

    p <- p +
      geom_raster(data = grid_df, aes(x = x, y = y, fill = error), alpha = 0.75) +
      scale_fill_gradientn(colors = c("yellow", "red"), name = "Prediction Error")
  }

  p <- p +
    geom_path(data = ensure_xy(paths[[1]]), aes(x = x, y = y),
              color = "grey80", linewidth = 0.4) +
    geom_line(data = df_xnull, aes(x = x, y = y),
              color = "darkgrey", linetype = "dashed") +
    geom_line(data = df_ynull, aes(x = x, y = y),
              color = "darkgrey", linetype = "dashed") +
    geom_point(data = top_k, aes(x = x, y = y), shape = 4, size = 3) +
    geom_point(data = b_df, aes(x = x, y = y), color = "black", size = 2) +
    labs(x = "x", y = "y") +
    coord_cartesian(xlim = xlim, ylim = ylim) +
    theme_bw()

  p
}

# --------------------------------------------------
# Main loop: sample cloud around each b, compute error, plot
# --------------------------------------------------
process_grid <- function(b_mat, strang_h, par, paths,
                         n_cloud = 300,
                         cloud_sd = c(0.15, 0.15),
                         k = 50,
                         xlim = c(-1.4, 1.4),
                         ylim = c(-0.6, 2.2),
                         save = FALSE) {

  ngr <- nrow(b_mat)

  for (i in seq_len(ngr)) {
    b <- as.numeric(b_mat[i, ])

    # sample cloud around this b
    x_df <- sample_x_cloud(
      center = b,
      n = n_cloud,
      sd = cloud_sd,
      xlim = xlim,
      ylim = ylim
    )

    # compute errors on the cloud
    x_df$error <- apply(as.matrix(x_df[, c("x", "y")]), 1, function(x) {
      pred_error(x, b, strang_h, par)
    })

    # plot
    p <- plot_top_k_x_choices(
      paths = paths,
      x_results = x_df,
      b = b,
      par = par,
      h = strang_h,
      k = k,
      xlim = xlim,
      ylim = ylim
    )

    if (save) {
      dir.create("best_FHN_splittings-TEST2", showWarnings = FALSE)
      png_file <- file.path("best_FHN_splittings-TEST2", sprintf("%s_topk.png", i))
      ggsave(filename = png_file, plot = p, width = 8, height = 6)
    }

    print(p)
  }
}
process_grid(
  b_mat = rbind(c(-1,0.5),
                c(1,0.5),
                c(-1/sqrt(3),-3/(2*sqrt(3))+0.5),
                c(1/sqrt(3),3/(2*sqrt(3))+0.5)),
  strang_h = 0.07,
  par = c(0.05,0.5,1.5,1.4,0.3,0.5),
  paths = example_path,
  n_cloud = 50,
  cloud_sd = c(0.25, 0.25),
  k = 50,
  save = FALSE
)
```
